nasb.text: ‘You shall rise up before the grayheaded and honor the aged, and you shall revere your God; I am the Lord.

esv.text: “You shall stand up before the gray head and honor the face of an old man, and you shall fear your God: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: “在白髮的人面前，你要起立；要尊敬老年人，又要敬畏你的　神；我是耶和華。

ccb.text: “在年长者面前，要恭敬站立，要敬重年长者。要敬畏你们的上帝。我是耶和华。
